title: Aterian, Inc. (NASDAQ:ATER) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Summary
text: Aterian achieved its second consecutive quarter of adjusted EBITDA profitability in Q3 2024. Net revenue declined 34% to $26.2 million from $39.7 million year-over-year, though this decline was primarily driven by strategic SKU rationalization and dehumidifier stockouts. The company reported an adjusted EBITDA gain of $0.5 million, representing a 111% improvement from a $4.4 million loss in the prior year quarter. Gross margin expanded significantly to 60.3% from 49.4%. CEO Arturo Rodriguez emphasized the company's focus, simplify, and stabilize mission: Our 2024 plan of focused, simplified, and stabilized Aterian continues to deliver positive results. The company has consolidated from 14-15 brands down to six core brands: hOmeLabs, Pursteam, Healing Solutions, Photo Paper Direct, Mueller Living, and Squatty Potty. For Q4 2024, management expects net revenue between $22.5-$25.5 million with adjusted EBITDA near breakeven. The company anticipates transitioning to a growth phase in 2025 through omnichannel expansion and organic product launches. Management noted that Growth will be one of our primary goals in 2025 as Aterian moves beyond stabilization toward revenue expansion and improved operating leverage.
